## Summary

- 

## Verification

- [ ] `mvn test`
- [ ] `mvn verify`
- [ ] Manual smoke test, if behavior changed
- [ ] Benchmark run, if overhead may change

## Checklist

- [ ] Changelog updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] Docs updated for config/API/behavior changes
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] No generated artifacts, local databases, logs, or jars committed
- [ ] Security/privacy impact considered
